escalation_flags.description: Today's collection (10 files, 3 substantive) contains ZERO Negeri Sembilan PRN 2026 election content. 7/10 sources returned 404 or minimal pages; 3 substantive sources are PRN Johor (polling day), World Cup 2026, and old (2021-2025) ohbulan entertainment tag pages. The collection script (ns-daily-collection.sh) is querying source URLs that surface Johor-focused/404/entertainment pages rather than NS-specific election content.
escalation_flags.impact: CVS-compliant NS sentiment analysis is IMPOSSIBLE from this collection. Standing contextual baseline (20260710) is decaying without verification.
escalation_flags.recommendation: URGENT: Reconfigure ns-daily-collection.sh source URLs to NS-specific sections (e.g., /negeri-sembilan/, /wilayah/negeri-sembilan/, NS politician/MB social feeds, SPR NS pages). Add NS-keyword content filters to discard Johor/non-NS election pages. Re-run collection.
escalation_flags.carries_forward_from: ESC-002 (20260710 Data Collection Failure) - escalated from MEDIUM to HIGH; root cause now identified as source targeting, not just login wall

escalation_flags.description: ns-sentiment-analysis.sh embedded Python is a placeholder stub that emits empty arrays - it does NOT call the OpenOSINT/Aras Integrasi Qwen3.5-397B API. No API key/endpoint env vars are set. vLLM remote API (model.arasintegrasi.ai) returns HTTP 401. ns-entity-extraction.sh has 5/7 categories with no extraction logic and produces pattern-inferred false positives (bersatu=KFC verb, bersama=Malay word, Puteri Wangsa=Johor DUN mis-tagged).
escalation_flags.impact: Automated CVS-compliant sentiment pipeline is non-functional. Analysis must be done manually by agent each cycle.
escalation_flags.recommendation: Wire OpenOSINT/Aras API call into sentiment script with auth credentials; add NS-specific entity extraction regex/patterns for all 7 categories (NS 36 DUN names, NS politician names); add source-attribution to every extracted entity. Until then, agent manual review is the only CVS-compliant path.

escalation_flags.category: Standing High-Risk Flag Unverified (Royal Crisis Impact)
escalation_flags.description: Prior baseline (20260710) flagged HIGH-severity royal succession crisis affecting 4 NS constituencies (Seri Menanti, Pilah, Johol, Kuala Klawang area) with negative Malay-voter sentiment. This flag CANNOT be confirmed or updated with today's verified source content (zero NS coverage collected). It carries forward as CONTEXTUAL ONLY, not CVS-verified.
escalation_flags.impact: Standing high-risk assessment is unverified and decaying. Without NS-sourced collection, cannot determine if crisis sentiment is escalating, stable, or resolving.
escalation_flags.recommendation: This remains a priority intelligence target. Cannot down-escalate without verified NS source content. Priority NS collection must be re-established to reassess.
escalation_flags.carries_forward_from: ESC-001 (20260710 Royal Crisis Impact, HIGH) - status unchanged, now explicitly UNVERIFIED by today's collection
